name: Assets Day 1-5 Technician Onboarding
description: Day 1-5 assets management onboarding and equipment provisioning

steps.title: Track Equipment Deliveries
steps.description: Monitor and confirm delivery of ordered equipment

substeps.title: Confirm phone delivery
substeps.description: Verify company phone has been delivered and activated

substeps.title: Confirm uniform delivery
substeps.description: Verify work uniforms have been delivered and fit properly

substeps.title: Confirm safety equipment delivery
substeps.description: Verify all safety equipment has been received and inspected

steps.title: Order Specialized Tools
steps.description: Process orders for role-specific tools and equipment

substeps.title: Finalize specialized tool requirements
substeps.description: Complete assessment of specialized tools needed based on role

substeps.title: Place specialized tool orders
substeps.description: Submit orders for all verified specialized tools and equipment

substeps.title: Setup tool tracking and accountability
substeps.description: Register tools in asset management system and establish accountability

steps.title: Setup Parts and Inventory Access
steps.description: Configure access to parts inventory and shipping systems

substeps.title: Setup initial parts shipment
substeps.description: Arrange for initial parts inventory shipment to technician

substeps.title: Configure inventory system access
substeps.description: Setup access to parts ordering and inventory management systems

steps.title: Complete Asset Accountability Setup
steps.description: Finalize asset tracking and accountability processes

substeps.title: Complete initial asset inventory
substeps.description: Document all assets assigned to technician in tracking system
